Issues: Lack of Technical Clarity: The extreme blur (bokeh/depth of field) makes the image challenging to use for high-resolution prints, detailed merchandise, or close-up applications. This limits its appeal as a fine art print.

Compositional Ambiguity: Due to the focus on color and blur, specific details—such as defining architectural elements or unique points of interest—are lost, making the image conceptually weaker than it appears.

Generalization/Tropism: The 'neon night street' aesthetic is highly popular but extremely common (a common cyberpunk/neo-noir trope). To increase sales viability, the image would need a unique element or signature detail to stand out from similar, mass-produced pieces.
